reviews.comment:
Un lugar hermoso, te transporta a los 40 , muy limpio, agradable

(Translated by Google)
A beautiful place, it takes you back to your 40s, very clean, pleasant

reviews.comment:
Muy cordiales,se quemo los baja
Dos controles me advirtieron
Me la cambiaron  sin cobrarme, salvo el repuesto H7

(Translated by Google)
Very friendly, the low beams burned out. Two remotes warned me. They replaced them without charging me, except for the H7 part.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/13471578260485529773/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNtajVLUENBEAE

reviews.comment:
Lamentable que los días domingos no acepten tarjetas . Ni débito ni crédito
Siempre lo mismo
Una sola persona para despachar

(Translated by Google)
It's unfortunate that they don't accept cards on Sundays. Neither debit nor credit cards.
Always the same.
Only one person to serve.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/13471578260485529773/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNtcTgtbUJREAE
